title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§385.  Budget to include additional salary

The governing authority of the parish of Lafourche shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:384.  

Amended by Acts 1968, No. 309, §1.
